L

Language - Enum Class in model
Enumeration containing the available languages for workers.
ListAdminWindow - Class in view
Modal dialog that lists administrators and allows adding, deleting and initiating password changes.
ListAdminWindow(JFrame, LoginController) - Constructor for class view.ListAdminWindow
Constructs the administrator list window.
ListBookWindow - Class in view
Modal dialog that lists bookings and provides operations to create, modify and delete bookings.
ListBookWindow(JFrame, LoginController) - Constructor for class view.ListBookWindow
Constructs the list booking dialog.
ListClientWindow - Class in view
Modal dialog that displays the list of clients and allows adding, modifying and deleting clients.
ListClientWindow(JFrame, LoginController) - Constructor for class view.ListClientWindow
Constructs the window showing all clients.
ListCruiseWindow - Class in view
Modal dialog that displays the list of cruises and provides operations to add, modify and delete cruises.
ListCruiseWindow(JFrame, LoginController) - Constructor for class view.ListCruiseWindow
Constructs the list cruises window dialog.
ListWorkerWindow - Class in view
Modal dialog that displays the list of workers in a table and provides operations to add, modify and delete workers.
ListWorkerWindow(MainWindow, LoginController) - Constructor for class view.ListWorkerWindow
Creates the dialog for listing and managing workers.
LoginController - Class in controller
Controller class managing the interactions between the View and the Model (DAO layer) for the cruise booking application.
LoginController() - Constructor for class controller.LoginController
 
LoginWindow - Class in view
Login dialog that prompts for username and password and validates credentials using the provided LoginController.
LoginWindow(StartWindow, LoginController) - Constructor for class view.LoginWindow
Constructs the login graphical dialog.
LUXURY - Enum constant in enum class model.TypeCruise
